mapper.sql: SELECT r.id AS reviewId, r.order_id AS orderId, reviewer.id AS reviewerId, reviewer.nickname AS reviewerName, reviewer.avatar_url AS reviewerAvatarUrl, target.id AS targetUserId, target.nickname AS targetUserName, target.avatar_url AS targetUserAvatarUrl, r.rating, r.content, r.create_time AS createdAt FROM t_review r JOIN u_user reviewer ON reviewer.id = r.reviewer_id AND reviewer.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user target ON target.id = r.target_user_id AND target.is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_review ( order_id, reviewer_id, target_user_id, rating, content ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{reviewerId}, #{targetUserId}, #{rating}, #{content} )
mapper.select: WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
